caption: The video displays a static graphic featuring logos and text against a plain white background. Centered in the image is the logo for the "INEC" (Independent National Electoral Commission), which consists of the Nigerian Coat of Arms inside a green circle, placed above an outline map of Nigeria. Below the map, the text "INEC" is written in large green letters, followed by the words "INDEPENDENT NATIONAL ELECTORAL COMMISSION" in a smaller, gray font. In the upper-left corner, a logo for "plustv" is visible. A maroon banner runs along the bottom of the screen; in the early frames, it features the word "SUBSCRIBE" on the left and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" on the right. As the video progresses, the text on the left of the banner changes to "FOLLOW US" and the URL on the right becomes slightly fragmented.
